title: Face's cobblemon recipees
description: Adds recipes for cobblemon, mega showdown and myths and legends. Uses create for some but not needed for the rest.
body: Adds recipes for some uncraftable items in Cobblemon, such as abilty capsules/patches, exp candy and gems. Also adds recipes for [Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown) and [Myths and Legends](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-myths-and-legends-sidemod). Some recipes like bigger exp candy needs [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), but the other recipes should work without it.
